meta.title: Elowen — Weddings, Curated · v32 Alora
meta.description: An atelier for weddings of quiet grandeur. Template concept.

sections.slotTag: slot foto — pareja entre niebla de montaña
sections.k: Beyond exquisite · your vision · seamlessly realised
sections.p: Your wedding day deserves to be a masterpiece — a reflection of your story, imbued with unhurried elegance and flawless execution. We don't just plan weddings; we orchestrate memories. Placeholder copy.

sections.h: AN ATELIER FOR WEDDINGS OF QUIET GRANDEUR
sections.p: Elowen is a full-service planning studio taking a handful of celebrations each year. Fewer weddings, deeper attention — from the first sketch of the day to the last dance. Placeholder studio copy.

cards.p: From venue to vows — every vendor, timeline, and detail carried by the studio.
Palettes, florals, tablescapes, and light — composed like a single photograph.
Month-of coordination for couples who planned beautifully and want to hand off the reins.

sections.h: WE ARE ETERNALLY GRATEFUL FOR THE CALM SHE CARRIED INTO EVERY ROOM
A MASTERPIECE, COMPOSED IN FOUR MOVEMENTS

steps.d: Your story, your vision, your non-negotiables — heard fully before anything is planned.
Design, venues, and vendors curated into one coherent, breathtaking whole.
Timelines tightened, contingencies staged, families briefed — quietly.
You are guests at your own wedding. We conduct from the wings.

sections.q: EVERY DECISION FELT LIGHTER WITH ELOWEN BESIDE US. THE DAY ITSELF WAS, SIMPLY, THE BEST OF OUR LIVES.
